_comment: Rename to settings.json and copy to ~/.claude/. Per-OS command adjustments applied by install scripts.

mcpServers._comment: These entries are PLACEHOLDERS. install.sh rewrites them with OS-specific command arrays. POSIX: command=npx, args=[-y, gemini-mcp-tool]. Windows native: command=cmd, args=[/c, npx, -y, gemini-mcp-tool].

_effort_note: effortLevel and alwaysThinkingEnabled are intentionally OMITTED here. Set them per-session or per-project via settings.local.json to avoid forcing high-cost thinking onto Sonnet/Haiku sessions.
